explanations.3: This number between 0 and 1 controls how transparent the background image appears—0.3 means it's 70% see-through so you can read text over it.
explanations.4: This is a unique identifier (guid) that Windows Terminal uses internally to distinguish this profile from others, even if they have the same name.
explanations.8: The four backslashes at the start are an escape sequence—each pair (\\) represents a single backslash in the actual file path to the WSL (Windows Subsystem for Linux) Ubuntu filesystem.
